headline: Jordan Henderson
body: Jordan Henderson needs surgery on the freak injury he suffered during England's celebrations against Mexico. Cruel blow for the former Liverpool captain. nytimes.com/athletic/7425239… Link England’s Jordan Henderson requires wrist surgery, set to miss rest of World Cup The Brentford midfielder landed awkwardly as he slipped while climbing over the advertising hoardings after the 3-2 win over Mexico. nytimes.com
raw_text:
Jordan Henderson needs surgery on the freak injury he suffered during England's celebrations against Mexico.
Cruel blow for the former Liverpool captain.

nytimes.com/athletic/7425239…

Link



England’s Jordan Henderson requires wrist surgery, set to miss rest of World Cup

The Brentford midfielder landed awkwardly as he slipped while climbing over the advertising hoardings after the 3-2 win over Mexico.
